A

accept(int) - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Accepts a grab offer, then reloads on success.
ACCEPT_GRAB - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Accept an active waiting-list grab offer.
acceptBtn - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController.TickTarget
The Accept button to disable when the offer expires.
acceptGrab(int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Accepts an active grab offer, confirming the WAITING reservation (the server re-validates the offer window and capacity).
ack(int) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Acknowledges a notification (marks it read) by stamping acknowledged_at = NOW() — the seen-marker behind the notification center's unread highlight.
ACK_NOTIFICATION - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Acknowledge (mark read) a single notification.
ackNotification(int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Acknowledges (marks read) a single notification, clearing its unread state.
acknowledge(int) - Method in class client.view.NotificationCenterController
Acknowledges one notification, then reloads on success so it clears unread.
acknowledgedAt - Variable in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Acknowledgement timestamp (string form), or null while unread.
ACTIVE - Static variable in class client.app.Navigator
Pseudo-class toggled on the active sidebar button.
activeCard(int, int, int, int) - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Builds the "active reservations" card with a per-status breakdown.
activeClients - Variable in class server.net.OrderServer
Every accepted client socket, so OrderServer.stop() can force-close them.
activeSubs - Variable in class client.view.BaseController
Active local subscriptions, drained on BaseController.onHide().
addConnectionListener(NetworkService.ConnectionListener) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Registers a listener notified of connection-state changes.
addDetail(GridPane, int, String, String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Adds one read-only "key: value" line to the detail grid.
addLog(VBox, boolean, String) - Static method in class client.view.Widgets
Adds a new entry to the activity log.
addSubmittedRow(ParamField, int, int) - Method in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Prepends a row to the session-local "submitted this session" list.
alertLabel - Variable in class client.view.DashboardController
Attention/alert banner line.
AMBER - Static variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Amber (stopped/idle status).
ampmCombo - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
AM/PM dropdown.
ampmCombo - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
AM/PM dropdown.
appendLog(boolean, String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Prepends a timestamped entry to the activity log (capped at 200 lines).
ApprovalQueueController - Class in client.view
Approval-queue screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
ApprovalQueueController(NetworkService, Session) - Constructor for class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Creates the approval-queue controller.
APPROVE_PARAM_CHANGE - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Approve a pending parameter-change request (dept.
APPROVED - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ChangeStatus
Approved by a department manager; the new value has been written to the park.
approveParamChange(int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Approves a pending change (DEPT_MANAGER only); on success the new value is written to the park.
AuthController - Class in server.control
Owns the authentication / registration domain (login, logout, single-login lock, subscriber & guide registration).
AuthController() - Constructor for class server.control.AuthController
Creates the authentication controller.
authDao - Variable in class server.control.ParkController
Authentication data access (role checks).
authDao - Variable in class server.control.ReportController
Authentication data access (role checks).
authDao - Variable in class server.control.ReservationController
Authentication data access (role checks).
authDao - Variable in class server.control.VisitController
Authentication data access (role checks).
AuthDAO - Class in server.dao
Data access object for authentication: staff/visitor credential lookups and the single-login lock backed by the active_session table.
AuthDAO() - Constructor for class server.dao.AuthDAO
Creates the authentication DAO.
available - Variable in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
Remaining headroom: maxCapacity - gapSize - current (may be negative).
availableCapacity(int, String) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Computes the remaining headroom for a park on a given date: the park's max_capacity minus its gap_size minus the total party size of all PENDING/CONFIRMED reservations for that park and date.
avgPerDay - Variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Average cancellations+no-shows per calendar day of the inclusive range.
avgStayMinutes - Variable in class common.dto.VisitsReportRow
Average stay in minutes over the closed visits (0 if none closed).
